product_overview: A React-based Management and Assessment platform that lets students take timed assessments and administrators create tests, upload users in bulk, and review results. The app provides routes for authentication, assessment lifecycle, admin wizards, and user-facing dashboards and profile management.
core_goals: Allow users to authenticate and recover access so they can reach their personalized dashboard
Guide students through the full assessment lifecycle: read instructions, take active tests, and receive submission confirmation
Enable administrators to create tests via a multi-step wizard and to upload users in bulk
Provide views for students and admins to review test results and for users to manage their profile and uploads
Surface educational resources and system settings for ongoing learning and configuration

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Sign in to a user account and request a password reset when needed.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Enter email and password -> Submit login form -> See dashboard at /dashboard
Navigate to / -> Enter invalid email or password -> Submit login form -> See validation message about invalid credentials
Navigate to /forgot-password -> Enter account email -> Submit password reset request -> See confirmation that reset instructions were sent

features.name: Assessment Lifecycle
features.description: Complete an assessment from pre-test instructions through active test to submission confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to /assessments/instructions -> Read instructions -> Start test to enter active assessment at /assessments/active -> Select answers for questions -> Submit test -> See submission confirmation at /assessments/submitted

Navigate to /assessments/instructions -> Start test to enter active assessment at /assessments/active -> Attempt to submit with required questions unanswered -> See validation message preventing submission

features.name: Admin Test Creation (Create Test Wizard)
features.description: Create a new test using a multi-step wizard (basic info, questions, preview & confirm).
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/create-test -> Provide basic test information -> Add questions and answers -> Preview test content -> Confirm and submit wizard -> See new test available in /tests
Navigate to /admin/create-test -> Leave required fields blank in a step -> Attempt to proceed to the next step -> See validation messages preventing progression

features.name: Bulk User Upload
features.description: Upload a CSV/Excel file to create or update many users at once and review validation feedback.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/bulk-upload -> Upload a valid CSV/Excel file containing users -> Review validation summary -> Confirm upload -> See confirmation that users were processed
Navigate to /admin/bulk-upload -> Upload a malformed CSV/Excel file -> Review validation report showing row-level errors -> Correct the file and retry upload

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Provide a personalized overview for the signed-in user with entry points to tests, results, and profile.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See personalized overview and notifications -> Navigate to /profile to view profile details
Navigate to /dashboard -> See list of actionable items and available tests -> Navigate to /tests to browse tests

features.name: Profile Management
features.description: View and update personal profile information.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> View profile details -> Edit profile fields -> Save changes -> See updated profile details

features.name: Tests List & Start
features.description: Browse available tests and begin the assessment flow.
user_flows: Navigate to /tests -> Browse available tests -> Select a test to view details -> Navigate to /assessments/instructions to begin that test

features.name: Results Viewing
features.description: View individual and aggregated test results depending on role.
user_flows: Navigate to /results/student -> View individual performance details and breakdowns
Navigate to /results/admin -> Apply filters and view aggregated results by class or date range

features.name: Resources
features.description: Browse and access educational materials provided by the system.
user_flows: Navigate to /resources -> Browse available materials -> Open or download a selected resource

features.name: My Uploads
features.description: Manage files and uploads associated with the signed-in user.
user_flows: Navigate to /uploads -> View list of user uploads -> Upload a new file -> See the new file listed in uploads

features.name: System Settings
features.description: Adjust system or user-visible settings and save changes.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Change a configurable option -> Save settings -> See confirmation that settings were saved

features.name: Management Area
features.description: Access administrative management tools and user lists for system administration.
user_flows: Navigate to /management -> View management tools and user lists -> Perform a management action and see the updated state reflected in the list

routes.description: Multi-step wizard to create a new test
Active test environment with timer and questions

features.name: Assessment Lifecycle
features.description: Taking a test from instructions to submission
